title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
description: Own core platform services powering billing, auth, and tenant provisioning for every TalentIQ customer. You'll work closely with Diego's team to harden the multi-tenant architecture as we scale past 500 enterprise accounts.
requirements: 6+ years building backend services in a production environment
Experience with distributed systems and service-to-service auth
Comfortable owning on-call rotation for critical infrastructure

title: Product Manager, Growth
description: Drive activation and expansion experiments across the self-serve funnel. You'll partner with Marketing and Design to increase trial-to-paid conversion and reduce time-to-first-value for new HR teams.
requirements: 3+ years of PM experience with a growth or activation focus
Comfortable running quantitative experiments and reading SQL
Strong written communication for cross-functional alignment

title: Account Executive, Enterprise
description: Run full-cycle sales into HR and Talent Acquisition leaders at 1,000+ employee companies. You'll inherit a warm pipeline from our SDR team and work alongside Camille's top-performing enterprise pod.
requirements: 4+ years closing enterprise SaaS deals over $50K ACV
Experience selling to HR, Talent, or People Ops buyers a plus
Track record of consistently hitting or exceeding quota

title: Product Designer
description: Design end-to-end flows for the ATS pipeline and analytics dashboards. You'll partner directly with Nadia and engineering to bring the design system to new parts of the product.
requirements: 3+ years of product design experience
Portfolio showing complex data or workflow-heavy interfaces
Fluent in Figma and collaborative design systems work

title: Customer Success Manager
description: Own onboarding and renewal for a portfolio of mid-market and enterprise accounts. You'll join Aisha's team, which posted a 96% renewal rate last year.
requirements: 3+ years in a customer success or account management role
Experience managing a portfolio of 20+ B2B SaaS accounts
Comfortable leading QBRs with VP- and C-level stakeholders

title: Technical Recruiter
description: Partner with Engineering leadership to build a scalable, high-signal interview process as we double the engineering org over the next 18 months. Paused pending Q3 headcount approval.
requirements: 3+ years recruiting for engineering roles in-house
Experience building structured interview loops and scorecards
Comfortable advising hiring managers on leveling and offers

title: Staff Software Engineer, Backend
description: Set technical direction for the candidate-scoring and analytics services that power TalentIQ's AI insights. This is a hands-on, high-autonomy staff role with no direct reports.
requirements: 8+ years of backend engineering experience
Track record leading architecture decisions across multiple teams
Experience with event-driven systems and data pipelines

title: Marketing Manager, Demand Generation
description: Own the paid and lifecycle demand generation engine, reporting to Talia. You'll manage Felix and set the strategy behind our pipeline targets for the back half of the year.
requirements: 5+ years in B2B SaaS demand generation
Experience owning a paid media budget of $500K+ annually
Strong grasp of marketing attribution and lifecycle nurture

title: Financial Analyst
description: Support headcount planning, board reporting, and monthly close alongside Beatrice's team as Finance scales its operating cadence.
requirements: 2+ years of FP&A or corporate finance experience
Advanced Excel/Sheets modeling skills
SaaS metrics fluency (ARR, NRR, CAC payback)

title: Sales Development Representative
description: Generate qualified pipeline for the mid-market sales team under Elena. A strong track for promotion into a closing role within 12-18 months for reps who hit ramp targets.
requirements: 1+ years in a sales, support, or customer-facing role
Excellent written and verbal communication
Coachable, organized, and comfortable with outbound prospecting
